about.label: About me
about.title: I build websites with a focus on design, speed and usability
about.paragraph1: My name is Oleksandra, and I am a Front-End Web Developer. I create modern landing pages and portfolio-style websites for experts, small businesses and personal brands.
about.paragraph2: I work with React, Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS. For me, a website should not only look beautiful, but also be clear, fast, responsive and help clients make decisions.
